message:
feat: wire ConversationView to use rich component renderer

Replace string-based line storage with React.ReactNode-based lines.
ConversationView now calls renderEventComponent() which returns Ink
components with colors, icons, and formatting baked in. Duration
tracking added via startTimes ref that pairs _start/_end events to
compute elapsed time shown on tool and delegation end lines.

Remove EVENT_COLORS mapping (no longer needed -- colors are embedded
in the components themselves). Update tests to match new output format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
